title: Asal Sayi Kontrolu
subtitle: Asal sayilari bulma ve test etme.
code:
<?php

function isPrime(int $number): bool {
    if ($number < 2) return false;

    for ($i = 2; $i * $i <= $number; $i++) {
        if ($number % $i == 0) return false;
    }
    return true;
}

echo "1-50 arasindaki asal sayilar:\n";
$primes = [];

for ($i = 1; $i <= 50; $i++) {
    if (isPrime($i)) {
        $primes[] = $i;
    }
}

echo implode(", ", $primes) . "\n";
echo "\nToplam asal sayi adedi: " . count($primes) . "\n";

// Tekil kontrol
$testNumber = 97;
echo "\n" . $testNumber . " asal mi: " . (isPrime($testNumber) ? "evet" : "hayir") . "\n";

$testNumber = 100;
echo $testNumber . " asal mi: " . (isPrime($testNumber) ? "evet" : "hayir") . "\n";

?>
